title: senecio polyodon
intro: Senecio polyodon, also known as Jacob's Ladder, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The medicinal properties of Senecio polyodon include its ability to reduce inflammation and its antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Senecio polyodon can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds, coughs, and minor wounds.
